title: FleshZ [Neo/Forge]
description: Not another rottenflesh to leather mod anymore
body:
# **Description:**

Mobs which used to drop leather, now drop hide which has to get prepared with sugar and dried at the wood rack to get leather now.

Rottenflesh can be combined to rotten leather which can get dried to get hide. 

![image](https://i.imgur.com/zP5ouDw.png)

This is a **port of the original Fabric mod** **_FleshZ_** to **Forge/NeoForge.**

## **Compats:**
- EMI
- JEI
- EveryComp (WoodGood)

## Credits:
- **[Globox_Z](https://modrinth.com/mod/fleshz)** - The Original creator of the Fabric mod FleshZ. All credits for the original assets and ideas go to him.
